item.title: Memes that are worryingly applicable to my workplace
item.description:
A buncha memes that describe my work environment to a shocking degree of accuracy
Hashtag corporate culture, amirite? “We have fun here!”
Disclosed my chronic depression diagnosis to a past employer and two weeks later was written up for “not smiling enough” in team meetings. Yes, I am a woman. No, this was not the 1950s.
Anyone else have a work culture where people one-up each other by bragging about how late they work/how many weekends, family vacations, and holidays they work?
Used this exact argument with my boss when we were posting a job opening last year.
but also this man drinks unicorn blood or something — he hasn’t aged a day
Trying to ~manifest~ this into reality for myself. Already have my dream quitting scenario all planned out lol
My workplace only has three women in it and we sardonically joke that we are the housekeepers, peacemakers, party planners, and emotional managers. It f*ucking sucks tbh.
Oh hello is this [my boss]?
Also [my boss] (could also be applied to the Republican Party, but we don’t have to go there right now)
This has circulated on our office slack regarding the CEO so many times it’s losing its potency
If I could share without sacrificing the involved parties’ anonymity, I’d post the email exchange with my boss in which he says these exact words (except it was 5 instead of 14)
We’ve been “with all due respect”ed so much we flinch whenever an outside client uses it with actual respect
The “I don’t sleep” culture is strong with this office
He who shall not be named. We swear the term shadow IT was invented because of him.
My mantra.
¯\_(ツ)_/¯
Here’s a cat I saw on a walk. I’d post my own gorgeous cat tax but I’ve gotta maintain a little privacy in case someone reads this and fires me wheee! Thanks for reading and helping me create some more storage space on my phone! I’ll just be over here strapping on my little helmet and jumping into a job cannon where I can be shot into job land (LinkedIn) where jobs grow on little job trees! Byeeeeee! Edit: most viral! Gang thank you! It pays to stop lurking, I guess. This is a depressing celebration because HOT DAMN a lot of us are in shitty jobs. Hang in there, fam, and remember: “Apes together strong”
item.dc:creator: smudgiebudget

item.title: Happy dog meme dump for your Saturday needs
item.description:
That's one safe kid
I know the feeling
a very wriggly but cute back rest
Think I could get away with that?
first come first served
Obviously
I'm trying to help my friend pull his little lady out of some serious kidney issues stemming from a poisoning she went through a couple years ago. The fight has been long and hard but we still hope they can get out of them in the end. If you can help them out, please do! https://gofund.me/d8e3dd17 Two thirds done! you guys are amazing!
item.dc:creator: thedeadredhead

item.title: I saved his life..because he is my entire world.
item.description:
At first I thought his was teasing me... makeing funny sounds instead of answering me. We just had a conversation the day before about how I miss being playful..and that we were kinda in a rut. He wasn't playing. I made him stick his tongue out...no problem. Smile..no problem. I thought maybe he was groggy from talking benadryl the night before. I made him some coffee and got dressed for work. I asked him do you feel funny? It felt like forever for him to answer...he kinda squeaked and then said "siiiideways" I ran and told my daughter that I needed her to look after her brother while I took Dad to the ER. He just turned 47..he has worked so hard the last 2 years losing 80 lbs. He quit smoking 10 years ago..but I knew. I work in healthcare..mostly in pediatrics..but I spent a few days on the stroke rehab floor. I knew .. I got him to hospital in time... he got medication in time. He is able to walk, his balance is good. He understands when poeple speak to him...his speech is impaired but getting better every day. He has always taken care of me.. when our son nearly died at brith..he was my rock. When I had cancer.. I didn't have to worry. When I had complications from the hysterectomy and I couldn't walk.. he held me up. He is scared that he won't be able to work again, he is worried about money.. he is self conscious of how he sounds. I hope I can be the support he needs. I hope my love and patience is enough. Hug your people.
It doesn't matter if there is one symptom or all of them..just go to the ER
Shadow and Trouble cat Tax
My sexy beast and his favorite girl !
item.dc:creator: Mommamisty

item.title: This is the best thing I've read today
item.description: Now if only they'd use their immeasurable wealth to, oh, I don't know, work towards saving the one planet we have. Glorious sauce: https://twitter.com/sim_kern/status/1411304471934685184 (originally posted by @ParallelParkingInABurka on 2021-07-03 20:04:13)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Sometimes lies can be fun
item.description: My toddler and I live thousands of miles away from most of our family and friends so they are very used to FaceTiming their favorite relatives. Sometimes when my kid starts babbling someone’s name, I commit the following crime: First, I pull the person they’re asking for up on my phone and hit call. Then I get my kid’s attention, drop my phone on the floor and run away to hide. Finally, by the time kiddo has picked up my phone, the relative answers to see my kid’s forehead on the screen and I hear them start to squeal excitedly about how my kid called them. They gush and babble together for a few moments before I walk back into the room and pretend to find my kid with my phone and act surprised at who they called. Then I let them talk a bit more and more often then not the person we called is grinning ear to ear along with my kid. Its absolutely precious and its my favorite thing to do every couple of days. I think my little one is picking up on the scheme and this last time they were already running to the phone after babbling someone’s name for a few seconds.
item.dc:creator: BearsBeatsBoubonicPlague

item.title: The Channel Tunnel is a 50.46-kilometre railway tunnel that connects Folkestone with Coquelles beneath the English Channel at the Strait of Dover. It is the only fixed link between the island of Great Britain and the European mainland.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: It's goth hula hooping, did you expect a lot of enthusiasm?
item.description: But who can keep from smiling when cartwheeling? Goths aren't soulless after all. Perfect landing? 10 out of 10? The boot give a +6, so keep that in mind when scoring. This concludes the goth Olympics. (There were shorts on in both Olympic events mods. Literally wearing more than the woman's volleyball team was allowed to wear, also like for sure totally not a witch, I promise, please don't puritan me)

item.title: Comicon!!! (Cool people I saw)
item.description:
Don't forget to bring a towl
I found him!
The coolest kid there
Beefy!
...
Their chemistry was too good not to include this candid
Jarjar
She made her own wings
The delorian? I think?
This family
R2D2 wolf whistled me idk if the shot caught it tho
Blind dog seizure alerts for seeing eye human
Groovy
DAD BOD THOR
I legit SQUEEEed
Amazing self made costume
Wow my camera is AWFUL!
*wink*
Marty Poppins and Cruelliot DeVille
This kid was SO ANXIOUS. Hid behind his mom most of the con (saw him a few times) but he agreed to let me get his picture. He has ALL of his joints locked here. Brave little moon knight
(: this is the first pic I took
And finally, me. (Don't worry, I mask, just not for the pic) My tickets were nonrefundable, bought in January. I lasted 1 hour. But it was a fun hour. Gonna try again tomorrow.

item.dc:creator: Mech0T1

item.title: 26 seconds.
item.description: Every 26 seconds, the Earth shakes. Not a lot — certainly not enough that you’d feel it — but just enough that seismologists on multiple continents get a measurable little “blip” on their detectors. But even though this pulse has been observed for decades, researchers don’t agree on what’s causing it. The mystery surrounding the phenomenon even has its own XKCD web comic. The pulse — or “microseism” in geologist lingo — was first documented in the early 1960s by a researcher named Jack Oliver, then at the Lamont-Doherty Geological Observatory. He’s best known for his later work that supplied some important early evidence for shifting tectonic plates. Oliver figured out that the pulse was coming from somewhere “in the southern or equatorial Atlantic Ocean” and that it was stronger in the Northern Hemisphere's summer months (or, the Southern Hemisphere's winter). “Jack didn’t have the resources in 1962 that we had in 2005 — he didn’t have digital seismometers, he was dealing with paper records,” explains Mike Ritzwoller, a seismologist at the University of Colorado, Boulder, whose team would independently come across the strange pulse some decades later. https://www.discovermagazine.com/environment/the-earth-is-pulsating-every-26-seconds-and-seismologists-dont-agree-why

item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: Well..
item.description: Don't care if this dies in usersub or not, But im heart broken, my cat is too. My GF, well ex dumped me and accused me of cheating. We were together for 2 and a half year, basically the pandemic. We've had issues with money during these times and roommate issues that made our lives so wound up and filled with anxiety. It was hard for us at time to communicate our issues or work things out. But I leave to go visit family and go to work for a day then come home to all her stuff gone, her cat gone, and note with her key. I never cheated on her, I have talked to past friends i had crushes on, but would never pursue anything, I loved this girl. She blocked me on everything, and told her friends and family and they believe here, but never got to hear my side. Not sure if my message will get to her, or if i should even write an apology letter and give it to her or a coworker at her work. My cat is sad that her cat is gone too. And she probably misses her too. Im broken, dont know what to do, i dont have any friends and getting back into the dating scene is scary. *Thanks random strangers on the internet. Send memes, movies or shows for me to look at and watch*
item.dc:creator: 633k
